testcase.system-err: WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\aalos\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.14.12\byte-buddy-agent-1.14.12.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: scheduledMethod_failureEmitsFailedHeartbeatAndReraises
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-11T06:56:33.848+03:00 INFO 19868 --- [ scheduling-1] dev.allstak.sdk : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Sending to http://localhost:64128/ingest/v1/heartbeat: {"slug":"scheduled-hit-counter-boom","status":"failed","durationMs":0,"message":"scheduled boom"} 2026-04-11T06:56:33.854+03:00 INFO 19868 --- [ scheduling-1] dev.allstak.sdk : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Response from http://localhost:64128/ingest/v1/heartbeat: 202 {"success":true,"data":{"id":"test-uuid"}} 2026-04-11T06:56:33.855+03:00 ERROR 19868 --- [ scheduling-1] o.s.s.s.TaskUtils$LoggingErrorHandler : Unexpected error occurred in scheduled task

testcase.name: webClient_failurePath_doesNotCrashAndStillRecords
restTemplate_builderPath_isAutoInstrumented
scheduledMethod_successEmitsHeartbeatAutomatically

testcase.name: restTemplate_directConstructionPath_isAutoInstrumented
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-11T06:56:34.929+03:00  INFO 19868 --- [stak-flush-logs] dev.allstak.sdk                          : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Flushing 1 logs item(s)

2026-04-11T06:56:34.930+03:00  INFO 19868 --- [h-http-requests] dev.allstak.sdk                          : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Sending to http://localhost:64128/ingest/v1/http-requests: {"requests":[{"traceId":"6461db92-7b2a-4639-80b8-c76411391acb","spanId":"5e402a64-4c44-4c","direction":"outbound","method":"GET","host":"localhost","path":"/hello","statusCode":200,"durationMs":3,"requestSize":0,"responseSize":0,"timestamp":"2026-04-11T03:56:34.924662200Z","environment":"auto-test","release":"v1.0.0-auto"}]}
2026-04-11T06:56:34.930+03:00  INFO 19868 --- [stak-flush-logs] dev.allstak.sdk                          : [AllStak SDK DEBUG] Sending to http://localhost:64128/ingest/v1/logs: {"level":"error","message":"Unexpected error occurred in scheduled task
java.lang.IllegalStateException: scheduled boom
  at at dev.allstak.spring.AutoInstrumentationIntegrationTest$ScheduledHitCounter.boom(AutoInstrumentationIntegrationTest.java:296)
  at at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103)
  at at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580)
  at at org.springframework.aop.support.AopUtils.invokeJoinpointUsingReflection(AopUtils.java:351)
  at at org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.invokeJoinpoint(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:196)

  at at org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:765)
